qualifications.name: Bachelor of Pharmacy
notes: Source: RU Ready! Rhodes University Undergraduate Prospectus 2026.
Admission score type: Rhodes points / APS-style score.
Dean's discretion subject levels: Mathematics Level 5, Life Sciences Level 5, Physical Science Level 5.
No NBT requirement is shown in this table.
The BPharm degree is registered on the NQF as a Level 8 qualification.
The curriculum is set by the South African Pharmacy Council.
Focus: Anatomy and Physiology 1, Cell Biology, Chemistry, Foundation of Pharmacy, Introduction to ICT, Mathematics 1S, Pharmaceutical Biochemistry 1.

subject_requirements.subject: Physical Sciences
subject_requirements.note: Original subject requirement: Physical Science: Level 6, 70-79%.
